section.heading: What Our Clients Say
section.subtitle: Don't take our word for it.
section.label: Testimonials

testimonials.name: Ali Raza
testimonials.quote: Working with Nova completely transformed our online presence. Our bounce rate dropped by 35% and conversions increased by 40% in the first month.

testimonials.name: Sara Khan
testimonials.quote: They didn't just build a website — they built a complete booking ecosystem. Our online reservations increased by 65% within two months of launch.

testimonials.name: Usman Malik
testimonials.quote: Nova's understanding of our local real estate market was impressive. They delivered a platform that our agents actually love using.

testimonials.name: Zara Ahmed
testimonials.quote: Our brand finally feels premium. Nova redesigned everything from our logo to our checkout flow. The results speak for themselves.
